Mission
Grace Trace Ministries empowers individuals rebuilding their lives by providing safe, structured housing, supportive services, and opportunities that foster independence, stability, and long-term success.
Programs Offered
Residential Programs
01

Reentry Housing Program

Structured transitional housing for returning citizens. Accountability, drug testing, employment assistance, and life skills training while providing a safe environment to thrive in.

02

Veterans Transitional Housing

Immediate placement and wraparound support for homeless veterans. VA coordination, benefits navigation, and a clear path to permanent housing stability.

03

DBMD Residential Care

Specialized residential care for deaf-blind individuals. Trained Interveners provide individualized communication support and daily care.

04

Disability Group Homes & Assisted Living

24-hour supervised residential care for adults with intellectual, developmental, and physical disabilities and elderly individuals.

05

Young Adults Independent Living

Life skills, financial literacy, employment readiness, and housing support for young adults transitioning to independence.

Program Standards
Compliance & Operations

Private Rooms — Total Privacy

Every resident receives their own private room. No shared sleeping spaces of any kind. Dignified, structured residential environments.

Drug Testing

All residents subject to random drug testing at any time. Zero tolerance policy for all illegal substances and alcohol.

Curfew & Accountability

Daily sign in/sign out logs, nightly curfew checks, and documented accountability for all residents at all times.

Case Management

Individual Service Plans for every resident. Weekly case manager check-ins. Employment assistance, benefits navigation, and permanent housing planning.

Documentation & Reporting

Comprehensive operational logs, incident reporting, and weekly performance reporting. Full transparency and audit-ready records.

How to Refer Individuals to Grace Trace Ministries

01
Initial Contact
Contact us by email at info@gracetraceministries.org or visit gracetraceministries.org. Provide individual's name, supervision status, and program needed.
02
Screening & Intake
We conduct a brief eligibility screening. All required documentation is collected. Drug test administered at move-in. Same-day intake available when space allows.
03
Placement & Reporting
Individual is placed in their own private room. Weekly progress reports available for referring agencies. Ongoing coordination maintained throughout residency.
